welcome_offer.description: $200 cash back after you spend $1,500 on purchases in the first 6 months of account opening. Delivered as 20,000 ThankYou® Points (equivalent to $200).

earning_rates.notes: 1% when you buy, 1% when you pay

other_benefits.name: Intro Balance Transfer APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 18 months on balance transfers completed within 4 months of account opening. After that, 18.24% - 28.24% variable APR.

other_benefits.name: Citi Entertainment
other_benefits.description: Access to Citi Entertainment for special event access.

sources.notes: Official Citi page confirms $200 bonus after $1,500 spend in 6 months, 2% (1%+1%) on all purchases.
Credit Karma review confirms $0 AF, $200 bonus for new cardholders (as of Mar 31 2026), 2% flat rate.
CNBC confirms $200 cash back after $1,500 spend in first 6 months, 2% on every purchase.
